sglang.title: added support for tied weights in qwen pipeline parallelism
sglang.author: FrankLeeeee
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Some Qwen variants have tie_word_embeddings = true, however, the current code only caters to case where its value is false. If this value is true, the last rank cannot tie weights successfully since the embed tokens is a PPMissingLayer on the last rank.

I have added logic to:

handle em

sglang.title: [PD] Fix prefill_servers in mini_lb
sglang.author: wangxiyu191
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current code updates the prefill_configs of MiniLoadBalancer but does not update prefill_servers, causing prefill_servers to be inaccurate. This affects interfaces such as /flush_cache. Fix the above issue.

Modifications
Change prefill_servers to a getter function and calculate value

vllm.title: [Core][Multimodal] Convert PIL Image to array without data copy when hashing
vllm.author: lgeiger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR favours np.asarray over np.array when converting from PIL.Image to an array. This is recommended in their docs as it uses the array interface and doesn't need to copy the data which is faster.
I haven't done any end2end benchmarks since I don't expect any measurable improvements but since th

vllm.title: [CI/Build][Doc] Update `gte-Qwen2-1.5B-instruct` usage
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Recently, https://huggingface.co/Alibaba-NLP/gte-Qwen2-1.5B-instruct/commit/42e43ef36e0d56746e643ac83b8aca2b78ca9111 fixed the attention mask in Alibaba-NLP/gte-Qwen2-1.5B-instruct. This PR updates our docs and tests accordingly to pass with the updated config.

vllm.title: [Misc] Fixed the abnormally high TTFT issue in the PD disaggregation example
vllm.author: zhaohaidao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The response in the decode phase is not set to the event-stream format, resulting in an abnormally high TTFT. even when the load is very low (for example, concurrency is 1). The reason is that all tokens are returned together.
Before Fix

After Fix

Reproduce script
#/bin/bash
model="/vllm-workspace

This is an alternative fix for #6314 that doesn't disable LoRA for the lm_head in GPTBigCode that we worked on today with @tjohnson31415 and @tdoublep .
Due to the weight-tie, in lora mode the lm_head implementation was being replaced with VocabParallelEmbeddingWithLoRA which is not meant for the lm
